2960267.title: Huize Herrie
2960267.description: Lynn heeft kaartjes voor de wedstrijd van haar ijshockeyclub. Lynn gaat ze steunen met een hele bak aan bijgeloof rituelen. // Mam en pap stellen een deal voor aan de kinderen; als je iets nieuws wilt, moet je iets ouds wegdoen.

2962288.title: Huize Herrie
2962288.description: Mam ziet een oproep in de krant, dat de redactie op zoek is naar een columnist over ouderschap. // Luna wil dolgraag een VIP kaart kopen voor het concert van Mick Swagger. Probleem is, dat Luna niet genoeg geld heeft.

2977704.title: Huize Herrie
2977704.description: In de schoolbus maakt Lincoln onaangenaam kennis met drie ouderjaars leerlingen en hij blijft de klos, met z'n vrienden.

2977874.title: Huize Herrie
2977874.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

2982281.title: Huize Herrie
2982281.description: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their "baby"sitter.

2982333.title: Huize Herrie
2982333.description: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job. But can he give up the perks that come along with it?

2984893.title: Huize Herrie
2984893.description: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

2988656.title: Huize Herrie
2988656.description: Er is een kamer vrij in Huize Avondrood en de vriendin van Lincolns opa wil er graag komen wonen.

2988688.title: Huize Herrie
2988688.description: Omdat ze dingen die ze niet leuk vinden niet willen doen, besluit de tweeling om elkaars plaats in te nemen.

2989076.title: Huize Herrie
2989076.description: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

3001876.title: Huize Herrie
3001876.description: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

3004849.title: Huize Herrie
3004849.description: When all 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby's little sister, Ronnie Anne.

3006838.title: Huize Herrie
3006838.description: Zach and Rusty fake an alien landing that sends the whole town on a hunt for little green men. // Clyde thinks he's a shoe-in for the Glee Club solo, until Lincoln accidentally auditions and lands the part.

3023624.title: Huize Herrie
3023624.description: Lori wil laatstejaars herinneringen maken met haar vrienden voordat ze van school gaan. // Als Lori Lola wegbrengt en Lily mee is, valt de jongste Herrie op door haar schattige uitstraling. De regisseuse wil graag met Lola en Lily werken.

3025708.title: Huize Herrie
3025708.description: De meiden van Lynns roller derby team hebben allen opeens verkering. Lynn voelt zich daardoor buitengesloten. // Clyde wil Emma vragen voor het Valentijnsbal. Maar hij wil zeker zijn dat ze ja zal zeggen, zodat hij geen blauwtje loopt.

3027404.title: Huize Herrie
3027404.description: Every April Fool's Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

3030268.title: Huize Herrie
3030268.description: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

3039296.title: Huize Herrie
3039296.description: Eager to be named Kings of the Con at the Ace Savvy convention, Lincoln and Clyde convince the sisters to go with them as the Full Deck. // But the girls get more attention, leading the boys to do whatever it takes to gain focus.

3005588.title: Huize Herrie
3005588.description: Lana wil meedoen aan de Royal Woods Go-Kart Grand Prix. Ze bouwt haar eigen auto en vraagt Lincoln als bijrijder. // Luan heeft een module koken op school, wat ze niet ziet zitten. Pap helpt haar en ontdekt dat ze een kooktalent is.

3006542.title: Huize Herrie
3006542.description: Omdat ze dingen die ze niet leuk vinden niet willen doen, besluit de tweeling om elkaars plaats in te nemen. // Als de kinderen bekvechten in de auto, rijdt Lori altijd wel ergens tegenaan. Maar deze keer raakt flip gewond.

3064444.title: Huize Herrie
3064444.description: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs.

3065279.title: Huize Herrie
3065279.description: Het is bijna zover, Lori gaat naar de Fairway Universiteit. Leni is alleen maar bang dat ze haar zus en beste vriendin kwijtraakt. // Clyde bakt onweerstaanbaar lekkere koekjes, zelfs schoolinspecteur Chen is lyrisch; ze wil een dozijn bestellen.

3069960.title: Huize Herrie
3069960.description: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their "baby"sitter.

3020345.title: Huize Herrie
3020345.description: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year. // When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily.

3023858.title: Huize Herrie
3023858.description: Lincoln purchases a kiddie pool, and things get out of hand when all 10 of his sisters want to use it. // After noticing that none of his sisters share his interests, Lincoln attempts to mold Lily into his mini-me.

3023903.title: Huize Herrie
3023903.description: When Lincoln and Clyde go to tour the middle school, Lynn gives them some questionable advice.

3024317.title: Huize Herrie
3024317.description: Lynn heeft kaartjes voor de wedstrijd van haar ijshockeyclub. Lynn gaat ze steunen met een hele bak aan bijgeloof rituelen. // Mam en pap stellen een deal voor aan de kinderen; als je iets nieuws wilt, moet je iets ouds wegdoen.

3024831.title: Huize Herrie
3024831.description: After seeing a scary movie (that his parents told him not to), Lincoln can't go to sleep and pulls an all-nighter. // When a common cold ravages through the loud house, Lincoln believes his sisters have turned into Zombies!

3026448.title: Huize Herrie
3026448.description: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

2991007.title: Huize Herrie
2991007.description: Met Luan opgesloten in de kelder, weet niemand wie er verantwoordelijk is voor de 1 april grappen.

3037593.title: Huize Herrie
3037593.description: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

3037660.title: Huize Herrie
3037660.description: When all 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby's little sister, Ronnie Anne.

3040108.title: Huize Herrie
3040108.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

3040395.title: Huize Herrie
3040395.description: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears.

2996217.title: Huize Herrie
2996217.description: Mam gaat undercover als leerling op de school van Leni, Luna en Luan om vrienden met hen te worden.

2996945.title: Huize Herrie
2996945.description: Every April Fool's Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. // The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

2998845.title: Huize Herrie
2998845.description: Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

2998879.title: Huize Herrie
2998879.description: When all 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full.

3001308.title: Huize Herrie
3001308.description: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

3001356.title: Huize Herrie
3001356.description: Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

3018051.title: Huize Herrie
3018051.description: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter. // Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

3022047.title: Huize Herrie
3022047.description: Luna wil graag doorbreken als rockster. Als ze ontdekt dat Chunk, haar roadie, die droom ook had en hij het dus niet gemaakt heeft, wil Luna de muziek opgeven. // De restjes van paps kookkunst zijn erg in trek; er wordt om gevochten.

3022102.title: Huize Herrie
3022102.description: Lori vindt zichzelf een kei in het maken van selfies. Dan ontdekt ze dat Carol Pingrey telkens meer likes krijgt dan zij. // Lola krijgt thuis onderwijs. De anderen vinden ook dat ze reden hebben om thuis te leren en die kans krijgen ze.

3045323.title: Huize Herrie
3045323.description: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

3045356.title: Huize Herrie
3045356.description: Desperate for their own space, Ronnie Anne and Sid find a hidden room and try to keep it a secret from the other tenants.

3057327.title: Huize Herrie
3057327.description: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

3068730.title: Huize Herrie
3068730.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

3077673.title: Huize Herrie
3077673.description: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their "baby"sitter.

3078464.title: Huize Herrie
3078464.description: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

3082884.title: Huize Herrie
3082884.description: When Carl witnesses Ronnie Anne save a dog, he becomes obsessed with being just like his newfound hero.

3084275.title: Huize Herrie
3084275.description: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

3086821.title: Huize Herrie
3086821.description: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.
